name: wxcode-admin-circle-social
title: Circle Community Admin
description: Friendly light-mode admin dashboard for online community and social platform operators — left sidebar with community switcher, topbar with search and date-range, 4 KPI cards, moderation queue with approve/remove actions, engagement chart, members table, and trending/flagged side panel. Original archetype for the community-ops use case.

query.en: Build me an admin dashboard for a community / social platform — sidebar with community switcher, moderation queue, member management, engagement metrics, and flagged content panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me an admin dashboard for a community / social platform — sidebar with community switcher, moderation queue, member management, engagement metrics, and flagged content panel.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
